notes: Roughly captures the mantle-left arms-right pose but the silhouette is broken into noisy parallel traces and the two long tentacles characteristic of the input photo are not distinctly rendered.
specific_issues: broken silhouette with multiple parallel outline traces creating photo-trace clutter
two long tentacles from the input photo not distinguished from the eight arms
eye reduced to a tiny dot rather than an almond shape with filled pupil
no ring-shaped suckers along the arms
linework is thin and fragmented rather than single-weight continuous ink
fin shape distorted and merged with mantle outline noise
stipple is scattered randomly rather than concentrated in the chromatophore fields visible in the photo
arm cluster lacks clear individual arm separation and proportional taper
